'''Junk beetles''' were [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. It was included in many dishes<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref> and was served with [[Dagobah mud cake]] for example.<ref name="Vader's Quest 1">[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]]</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] found a specimen of this species in the [[Mokk Stronghold]] on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="SWG" />
